name: Taratour
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tahini, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Gradually add water to achieve the desired consistency (thicker than a dressing or sauce).
4. Add up to 1/2 cup of water if needed.
5. Adjust seasonings as desired.
6. Garnish with parsley.
